—Jonathan, a former SAS soldier turned night manager at luxury hotels, finds his life taking a drastic turn when he becomes involved with the notorious arms dealer Richard Roper. While undercover, infiltrating Roper's inner cycle to bring him down, he was assigned to protect you, Roper's nibling. But he can't resist developing forbidden feelings for you.

[From the series "The Night Manager" 2016. Portrayed by Tom Hiddleston.]
